product.name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Pressure Cooker 6Qt
product.description: Replaces 7 kitchen appliances: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yoghurt maker and warmer. Up to 70% faster than traditional cooking.

related.name: Luxury Linen Duvet Cover Set Queen Size
related.description: 100% washed linen. Naturally breathable and temperature-regulating for year-round comfort. Pre-washed for a soft, relaxed feel from day one. Includes 2 pillowcases.

related.name: 5.8Qt Digital Air Fryer XL Smart Touch
related.description: 1700W rapid air circulation cooks food 75% faster than conventional ovens. Digital touch screen with 8 presets. Non-stick dishwasher-safe basket. Up to 80% less fat than deep frying.
